comment.body: This thread is for an agent session with claude.

issue.title: feat: skills/ — shared agent skills registry
issue.description:
Project-level skills that any Claude Code agent can load — with a registry for discovery.

## Structure

```
.skogai/skills/
├── skill-registry.json         # index of all available skills
├── skill-registry-schema.json  # schema for registry entries
├── manifest-schema.json        # schema for individual skill manifests
└── <skill-name>/
    ├── manifest.json
    ├── SKILL.md
    └── README.md
```

## Notes

* Existing skills to migrate: `api-design`, `java-best-practices`, `typescript`, `worktrunk`, `gptodo`, `skogai-git`
* Registry enables discovery without loading every skill

<issue identifier="SKO-172">
<title>feat: skills/ — shared agent skills registry</title>
<description>
Project-level skills that any Claude Code agent can load — with a registry for discovery.

## Structure

```
.skogai/skills/
├── skill-registry.json         # index of all available skills
├── skill-registry-schema.json  # schema for registry entries
├── manifest-schema.json        # schema for individual skill manifests
└── <skill-name>/
    ├── manifest.json
    ├── SKILL.md
    └── README.md
```

## Notes

* Existing skills to migrate: `api-design`, `java-best-practices`, `typescript`, `worktrunk`, `gptodo`, `skogai-git`
* Registry enables discovery without loading every skill
</description>
<team name="SkogAI"/>
<project name="SkogAI"/>
<parent-issue identifier="SKO-155">
<id>94dc5a97-10ae-43de-95af-cc99f98741bd</id>
<title>Epic: Migrate dot-skogai → .skogai/</title>
<description>
Consolidate `SkogAI/dot-skogai` into the `.skogai/` folder of `SkogAI/claude`. The dot-skogai repo is being deprecated — all its structure, scripts, and skills move here.

## Context

dot-skogai was a standalone repo for shared SkogAI agent infrastructure. The skogfences principle says agents are unix users — their shared infrastructure belongs in their shared home, not a separate repo. `.skogai/` in `SkogAI/claude` is that home.

## Sub-tasks

* [SKOGAI.md](<http://SKOGAI.md>) — root context router
* knowledge/ — decisions, learnings, patterns
* memory/ — session context and decision log
* plan/ — project planning structure
* tasks/ — local task tracking
* templates/ — starter templates for new content
* scripts/context/ — context generation scripts
* scripts/bootstrap/ — init and symlink setup
* email/ — skogai inter-agent messaging (inbox/outbox)
* workflows/ — automation definitions and action lists
* bin/ — shared executables for agent home
* skills/ — shared agent skills registry

## Repo

`SkogAI/claude` (`.skogai/` folder)
</description>
<status>Backlog</status>
<priority>High</priority>
